_comment: Notion MCP server configuration for AI editors (Cursor, Claude Desktop, Zed).
_setup: 1. Copy this file to .cursor/mcp.json (Cursor) or ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (Claude Desktop)
2. Replace YOUR_NOTION_TOKEN with your integration token from https://www.notion.so/profile/integrations
3. The MCP server lets your AI editor browse NVB databases interactively during development
4. To also use MCP at RUNTIME (in the verdict pipeline), start with HTTP transport — see README
